profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Pudjiadi Prestige Tbk engages in the real estate development business in Indonesia. The company operates in Property Sales, Apartment Rental and Maintenance, and Hotel segments. It engages in development and sale of residential areas, apartments, offices, shopping and business centers, recreational parks, shop houses, and hotels; interior designing and manufacturing of equipment; and planning, contracting, managing, and constructing of buildings, houses, bridges, roads, and parks, as well as land excavating and landfilling activities. The company is also involved in providing building management, property management and maintenance, consulting, and marketing consulting services; rental of buildings; and trading business. PT Pudjiadi Prestige Tbk was founded in 1980 and is based in Jakarta Barat, Indonesia.
